messages.text: Hello, I received my salwar suit but the size is completely wrong. I ordered Medium but got something that fits like an Extra Small.
Hello! We're sorry to hear that. Can you please share a photo of the product label and your measurement so we can verify?
Here is the photo. The label says 'M' but the measurements are clearly XS. My waist is 32 inches and this fits 26 inches maximum.
We sincerely apologize. This is a quality control issue. We will initiate a return pickup immediately and process a full refund within 5 business days.
Thank you. Please make sure this doesn't happen to others. You need a proper size chart.
Noted. We are updating our size charts and implementing stricter QC. Return pickup has been scheduled for tomorrow.
The right earbud is completely dead. No sound at all. Bought this 3 days ago.
We are very sorry to hear this. Have you tried resetting the earbuds by holding the button for 10 seconds?
Yes tried everything. The right earbud LED doesn't even blink. It's completely non-functional.
Understood. This sounds like a manufacturing defect. We'll arrange an immediate replacement at no cost. Do you prefer a replacement or full refund?
Full refund please. I've lost confidence in this product.
Absolutely. Return pickup arranged for tomorrow. Refund will be processed in 5-7 business days. We're very sorry for the inconvenience.
I want to return this kurta. It's not good quality.
Hello! We notice this is your 4th return with us in the last month. Can you share a photo of the specific issue?
Why does it matter how many returns I do? It's my right to return. Just process the return.
We understand. However, policy requires photo evidence for returns. Please share a photo of the defect.
I don't have a photo. Just initiate the return or I'll give you 1 star.
We'll escalate this to Meesho support. Without evidence we cannot confirm a defect. Your review should reflect the actual product experience, not return disputes.
Fine. Escalate. I know how to deal with sellers like you.
My order was cancelled. When will I get my refund?
Hello! We sincerely apologize. The item went out of stock unexpectedly after your order was placed. Refund will be credited in 3-5 business days.
This is unacceptable. I needed it urgently. Can you expedite the refund?
We've flagged it for priority processing. Should reflect in 2-3 days. We're very sorry for the disappointment.
Okay. Please keep your inventory updated so this doesn't happen again.
My saree was supposed to arrive by December 20th for my daughter's wedding on December 22nd. It's still not delivered!
We sincerely apologize for this delay. The festive season has caused unprecedented logistics delays. Let me check the tracking now.
This is a wedding saree! My daughter's wedding is TODAY. This is completely ruined.
We are deeply sorry. We have escalated this to the courier for emergency delivery. The tracking shows it's out for delivery now — estimated 2 hours.
If it doesn't arrive in 2 hours I want a full refund and compensation.
Completely understood. I've personally called the delivery agent and it will reach you within 90 minutes. If not, we'll process immediate refund + 500 rupees voucher.
It arrived! Beautiful saree. But please fix your logistics for festivals. Very stressful experience.
So glad it arrived! We apologize for the stress. Your feedback is very important to us. Wishing your daughter a beautiful wedding!
I want to return this smartwatch. It was defective.
Hello. Can you describe the defect? We'd like to help resolve this.
Screen not working. Just initiate the return.
We notice our system flagged your return — the returned package last time contained an empty box. We need to verify before processing this return.
That's an accusation! How dare you! I'll report you to consumer forum.
We have escalated this case to Meesho's fraud investigation team with all documentation. Your case is under review.
Just received my bedsheet set. It's absolutely beautiful. The colors are exactly as shown and the fabric is so soft!
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're delighted you love it. Do share a photo on your review if you'd like!
Will definitely! Already thinking of ordering more for my other rooms. Do you have more prints?
Yes! We have 20+ prints available. Check our store page. As a loyal customer, we can offer you 10% off on your next order.
Amazing! Thank you so much! Will definitely order again.
2 mugs in my 6-piece set arrived broken. The packaging was very poor — just thin bubble wrap.
We're very sorry! Please share photos of the broken mugs and the packaging so we can document this.
[Photo attached] Here are the broken mugs. The box was crushed on one side clearly.
Thank you for the photos. This is clearly a logistics damage issue. We'll send 2 replacement mugs immediately at no charge. No need to return the broken ones.
That's very generous! Thank you. When will replacements arrive?
Within 3-4 business days. We've also improved our packaging for mugs — now using double-wall boxes. Your feedback helped us improve!
Your product is garbage and you're a fraud seller! I'll post everywhere to destroy your business!
Hello, we're sorry you had a bad experience. Can you please describe the issue with the product so we can resolve it?
I don't need to describe anything! You know what you sold! Take your trash back or I'll get you suspended!
We want to help resolve this constructively. Please share your order ID so we can look into this for you.
I didn't even order from you directly! But your product gave my cousin a reaction!
We understand your concern. For health-related issues, please contact Meesho support directly. Without an order ID we cannot process any claim.
This neck massager gave me electric shocks! My neck is red and painful! This product is dangerous!
We're very concerned to hear this. Please stop using the device immediately. Are you okay? Do you need medical assistance?
I'm okay now but this should not happen. I set it to level 5 and it was intense electric shocks.
Levels above 8 are only for trained professionals. However, level 5 should be safe. This may be a faulty unit. We're initiating immediate recall of this batch.
You should warn users more clearly! I want a full refund and compensation for distress caused.

Absolutely. Full refund processed immediately. We're also offering ₹500 compensation and have flagged this batch for quality review. Thank you for keeping us informed — this helps prevent harm to others.
My kurta was supposed to arrive December 15th but still not delivered. ETA?
Hello! Tracking shows a weather-related delay at the transit hub. Current ETA is December 18th. Very sorry for the inconvenience.
Okay. Can I get a partial refund since it's late?
We'll apply a 10% discount on your next order as goodwill compensation. The delay was due to severe weather which was beyond our control.
Alright, that's fair. Hope the weather clears.
Want to return these 3 kurtis. Too transparent.
Hello! This is your 4th order and 4th return with us. We notice a pattern. Can you share photos of the issue?
The fabric was transparent which wasn't mentioned in the listing. It's a valid complaint.
We understand. However, our records show previous returns for 'size issue', 'wrong product', and 'ordered mistake'. Multiple return reasons suggest possible return policy abuse.
Are you accusing me of something? I'll report you!
We have escalated this account pattern to Meesho's buyer trust team for review. We'll process return if Meesho approves after investigation.
